Strategy Performance

BTC/USDT 5-minute scalping strategy with multi-indicator confluence signals — EMA crossover, VWAP, RSI, ATR volatility filter, and partial take-profit management.

Backtested over 6.2 years of historical data (2020–2026) across 646,000 candles. Full production infrastructure with real-time data ingestion, automated execution, and live Telegram monitoring.
